sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19099" key="baqu/strwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰθύ-στρωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19099.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deep-strewn, well-covered,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λέκτρα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:266" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Musae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">266</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κοίτη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:32:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.7</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
